username.description: Required. 150 characters or fewer. Letters, digits and @/./+/-/_ only.

MatchingAlgorithm.description:
* `0` - None
* `1` - Any word
* `2` - All words
* `3` - Exact match
* `4` - Regular expression
* `5` - Fuzzy word
* `6` - Automatic
